notes: Python 1.5.14 — three runtime hotfixes on top of 1.5.13. (1) Paged + prefix cache now actually stores on multi-turn chat: removed the benchmark-era output_len≤3 store-skip in scheduler._cleanup_finished that was killing paged cache for short-reply chat — turn 2 of identical prompts now hits paged + disk L2 (live-verified 27s → 350ms = 78×). (2) DSV4 fast-load (sidecar) now runs _fix_quantized_bits + MLA bit-inference after wiring TurboQuantSwitchLinear, so embed/lm_head dequantize doesn't fail on the first inference call. (3) JANGTQ_K bundles built today: convert script now migrates legacy rope_scaling → rope_parameters at config-emit time so transformers 4.45+ AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained loads them without the 'max_position_embeddings' AttributeError. All four API protocols (/v1/chat/completions, /v1/messages, /api/chat, /v1/responses) share the same engine + scheduler and therefore benefit from the cache-store fix uniformly.
